title: Malkiy-Tsedeq #4442
definition:
Melchizedek = "my king is Sedek"

 1) king of Salem and priest of the Most High God to whom Abram paid
    tithe after the battle he fought to free Lot; 'the order of
    Melchizedek' the order of the priesthood to which Christ belongs
nasbUsage:

 1) king of Salem and priest of the Most High God to whom Abram paid

    NASB:  my king is right, an early king of Salem
